mapper.update: update knowledge_process_task set task_status = 'RUNNING', progress = #{progress}, start_time = ifnull(start_time, now()), error_code = null, error_message = null where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
update knowledge_process_task set task_status = 'SUCCESS', progress = #{progress}, callback_time = now(), finish_time = now(), error_code = null, error_message = null where id = #{id} and deleted = 0

update knowledge_process_task set task_status = 'FAILED', progress = #{progress}, callback_time = now(), finish_time = now(), error_code = #{errorCode}, error_message = #{errorMessage} where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
